commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows Codex app-server `turn/completed` mismatch warnings, adds regression tests for cross-thread versus same-thread mismatches, and adds `transcripts` tool-display metadata to core and OpenClawKit resources.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +73, Other +11. Total +93 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main warns on any `turn/completed` with `matchesActiveTurn === false`, and the correlation helper makes cross-thread completions produce that false value.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can remove or redact the sensitive `meetingUrl` display detail while preserving the Codex warning fix.

target.title: fix: quiet cross-thread Codex turn completion broadcasts
target.body:
## Summary
- stop warning on normal cross-thread Codex app-server turn/completed broadcasts
- keep warning for same-thread completion notifications that point at a different turn
- add run-attempt regression tests for both cases

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** A Codex app-server `turn/completed` notification for another thread should be treated as normal global-bus broadcast noise, while a same-thread/different-turn completion should still warn.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw checkout on Valhalla, branch `fix/turn-completion-broadcast-mismatch`, head commit `b41039a75962eda1bc03a62b391d792d8042cf79`, Node via Corepack/pnpm using the repository's Codex app-server runtime path.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Started the Codex app-server run-attempt path locally, injected a `turn/completed` notification with `threadId="thread-other"` while active turn was `thread-1/turn-1`, then injected a `turn/completed` notification with `threadId="thread-1"` and `turnId="turn-other"`.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal capture from the local run:

```
Cross-thread notification:
activeThreadId=thread-1 activeTurnId=turn-1 threadId=thread-other turnId=turn-other matchesActiveThread=false matchesActiveTurn=false
observed warning count for "codex app-server turn/completed did not match active turn": 0
run stayed open until owning turn completed

Same-thread different-turn notification:
activeThreadId=thread-1 activeTurnId=turn-1 threadId=thread-1 turnId=turn-other matchesActiveThread=true matchesActiveTurn=false
observed warning count for "codex app-server turn/completed did not match active turn": 1
run stayed open until owning turn completed
```

- **Observed result after fix:** Cross-thread broadcast completions no longer emit the warning-level `turn_completion_mismatch` signal. Same-thread wrong-turn completions still emit the warning, preserving the useful suspicious-case signal.
- **What was not tested:** The patched branch was not deployed to Pearl/Vera/Valhalla gateways; fleet rollout should wait for merge/release or a deliberate canary.

## Tests
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-codex.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts
- corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts
target.author: bill492
